fullText: Hello. Today we're looking at the new automatic provisioning feature for GitHub repositories on Sonic Cloud. We have a sidebyside view. Our GitHub or on the left and our Sonic Cloud on the right. Creating a new repository in GitHub triggers provisioning of a project in Sonic Cloud, eliminating the need for any manual setup. A bound project is automatically provisioned and added to the Sona Cube organization. An initial scan then begins delivering actionable insights from the very first commit. Happy coding.
